headline: Schwab CEO Says AI Will Serve Below $1M Clients
summary: Ahead of Schwab's investor day, CEO Rick Wurster also said the firm was on a “multi-year” journey to bolster its workplace offerings, including retirement plan investments.

headline: Schwab Crypto Launch Tests Client Engagement And Revenue Mix For Charles Schwab
summary: Charles Schwab (NYSE:SCHW) has launched Schwab Crypto, a new service offering direct Bitcoin and Ethereum trading to U.S. retail clients. The rollout extends Schwab's crypto access beyond ETFs and derivatives to direct trading and holding of digital assets. This move marks a fresh step by a major U.S. brokerage into crypto access for mainstream investors. For investors tracking NYSE:SCHW, the crypto launch lands at a time when the stock trades around $91.17 and has risen 83.5% over the past...

headline: Bloom Energy, SanDisk Are Powering A MEME ETF Surge That Tripled Nasdaq 100 Returns
summary: The Roundhill MEME ETF is up 75% since April. Goldman says retail trading volumes have jumped 28% as margin debt hits a record $1.3 trillion.
